category_sources: source_facts.description says Nelm is a Kubernetes deployment tool for Helm Charts; official GitHub README describes Nelm as a Helm alternative for deploying to Kubernetes.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README uses the product name Nelm; source_facts.name is nelm.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the primary project documentation; official werf docs describe Nelm as built into werf for deployment tasks.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has official repository https://github.com/werf/nelm, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description mentions Kubernetes, deployment, and Helm Charts; official GitHub README describes Helm alternative behavior and release/resource deployment features.
